Package eu.algites.lib.common.object.props.labels

Annotation Interface AIaFieldLabel.Entry

Enclosing class:
AIaFieldLabel
public static @interface AIaFieldLabel.Entry

  • Required Element Summary

    Required Elements
    Modifier and Type
    Required Element
    Description
    String
    label
    Label value oif the label resolver is not used, otherwise ignored

  • Optional Element Summary

    Optional Elements
    Modifier and Type
    Optional Element
    Description
    AInRenderingOutputBuiltinFormat
    format
    Mode of the label if the default AInRenderingOutputBuiltinFormat is sufficient to be used.
    String
    formatCode
    Mode of the label if the default AInRenderingOutputBuiltinFormat is not sufficient.
    String
    localeCode
    Mode of the label if the default Locale is not sufficient.
    AInRenderingOutputBuiltinPurpose
    purpose
    Mode of the label if the default AInRenderingOutputBuiltinPurpose is sufficient to be used.
    String
    purposeCode
    Mode of the label if the default AInRenderingOutputBuiltinPurpose is not sufficient.

  • Element Details

    • purpose

      AInRenderingOutputBuiltinPurpose purpose
      Mode of the label if the default AInRenderingOutputBuiltinPurpose is sufficient to be used.
      Returns:
      purpose of the label
      Default:
      DEFAULT

    • purposeCode

      String purposeCode
      Mode of the label if the default AInRenderingOutputBuiltinPurpose is not sufficient.
      Returns:
      custom purpose code of the label
      Default:
      ""

    • format

      AInRenderingOutputBuiltinFormat format
      Mode of the label if the default AInRenderingOutputBuiltinFormat is sufficient to be used.
      Returns:
      format of the label
      Default:
      DEFAULT

    • formatCode

      String formatCode
      Mode of the label if the default AInRenderingOutputBuiltinFormat is not sufficient.
      Returns:
      custom format code of the label
      Default:
      ""

    • localeCode

      String localeCode
      Mode of the label if the default Locale is not sufficient.
      Returns:
      custom locale code of the label
      Default:
      ""

    • label

      String label
      Label value oif the label resolver is not used, otherwise ignored
      Returns:
      label value
